title: UK REACH authorisations for SEA Chromium Trioxide Authorisation Consortium (hard chrome (in-house)), 19 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide    Authorised uses    Use of chromium trioxide for hard chromium electroplating.    Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number    Surface Engineering Association Chromium Trioxide Authorisation Consortium (Hard Chrome (In-House)):     Edbro Hydraulics Ltd - UKREACH/25/05/00  I Holland Ltd - UKREACH/25/05/01  Precision Products (UK) Ltd - UKREACH/25/05/02  Riverside Gravure - UKREACH/25/05/03  Rotometrics International Ltd - UKREACH/25/05/04  Spline Gauges - UKREACH/25/05/05    Date of decision    19 February 2025  "
